reading.title: Reading: Urban vs rural
reading.passage: Rural life is more peaceful than city life. The city is more developed, but it's also more crowded and more polluted. The suburbs are quieter than the city centre, but still convenient. The population here is the highest it has ever been.

questions.question: The city is more peaceful than the countryside.
questions.explanation: "Rural life is more peaceful than city life."

questions.question: What is the population like now?
options: The highest it has ever been
questions.correct: The highest it has ever been
questions.explanation: "The population here is the highest it has ever been."

reading.title: Reading: Predicting urban growth
reading.passage: The population will grow a lot, based on the current trend. The city is going to expand into the countryside. More and more people will migrate to the city for work. The population here will probably double in ten years.

questions.question: The population will grow a lot.
What is the city going to do?
questions.explanation: "The city is going to expand into the countryside."
